nodes.name: Daily Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers the flow once daily at 9 AM to check for new Product Hunt launches

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: query { posts(order: NEWEST, first: 20) { edges { node { id, name, tagline, description, url, createdAt, makers { edges { node { id, name, username, profileUrl, twitterUsername } } } } } } }

nodes.name: Fetch Product Hunt Launches
nodes.notes: Makes a GraphQL request to Product Hunt API to get the latest launches

nodes.name: Format Launch Data
nodes.notes: Extracts and formats the launch data from the GraphQL response

nodes.name: Get Previously Processed Launches
nodes.notes: Retrieves the list of previously processed launches to avoid duplicates

nodes.name: Filter New Launches
nodes.notes: Filters out launches that have already been processed

nodes.name: Prepare Email Data
nodes.notes: Prepares personalized email data for each maker of the new launches

nodes.name: Send Outreach Email
nodes.notes: Sends personalized outreach emails to each maker

nodes.name: Update Processed Launches
nodes.notes: Updates the list of processed launches to avoid duplicates in future runs

nodes.name: Save Processed Launches
nodes.notes: Saves the updated list of processed launches for future reference

nodes.name: Check for New Launches
nodes.notes: Checks if there are any new launches to process

nodes.name: No New Launches
nodes.notes: Handles the case when no new launches are found

nodes.name: Success Response
nodes.notes: Provides a success response when emails are sent

nodes.name: Error Response
nodes.notes: Provides an error response when something goes wrong

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Handles errors that occur during the flow execution
